ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data recording */,
  "lost_load_usd" REAL /* Monetary value of lost load in USD */,
  "battery_flow_out_usd" REAL /* Monetary value of battery flow out in USD */,
  "battery_flow_in_usd" REAL /* Monetary value of battery flow in in USD */,
  "generator_cost_usd" REAL /* Monetary cost associated with generator usage in USD */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site where the data was collected */,
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the battery associated with the data */,
  "generator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the generator associated with the data */,
  "energy_source" TEXT /* Type of energy source (e.g., solar, wind, battery, generator) */,
  "energy_flow_direction" TEXT /* Direction of energy flow (e.g., in, out) */,
  "energy_loss_kWh" REAL /* Actual energy loss in kWh */,
  "battery_charge_level_kWh" REAL /* Current charge level of the battery in kWh */,
  "generator_runtime_hours" REAL /* Runtime of the generator in hours */,
  "generator_fuel_consumption_liters" REAL /* Fuel consumption of the generator in liters */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, manual input) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_generator_id FOREIGN KEY ("generator_id") REFERENCES generators ("generator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_battery_id FOREIGN KEY ("battery_id") REFERENCES batteries ("battery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batteries" (
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battery */,
  "battery_name" TEXT /* Name of the battery */,
  "capacity_kWh" REAL /* Total capacity of the battery in kWh */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the battery was installed */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the battery manufacturer */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the battery */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the battery */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "warranty_expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the warranty expires */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the battery (e.g., operational, under maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("battery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "generators" (
  "generator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generator */,
  "generator_name" TEXT /* Name of the generator */,
  "capacity_kW" REAL /* Total capacity of the generator in kW */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the generator was installed */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the generator manufacturer */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the generator */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the generator */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "warranty_expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the warranty expires */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used (e.g., diesel, natural gas) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the generator (e.g., operational, under maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of site (e.g., industrial, residential, commercial) */,
  "total_energy_capacity_kWh" REAL /* Total energy capacity of the site */,
  "total_energy_consumption_kWh" REAL /* Total energy consumption of the site */,
  "peak_energy_demand_kW" REAL /* Peak energy demand of the site */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last site inspection */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled inspection */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the site (e.g., active, inactive, under construction) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, technician, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read-only, read-write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "data_action" TEXT /* Specific action performed (e.g., view, download, modify) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES energy_data ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., financial, operational, maintenance) */,
  "report_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report detail */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated report */,
  "data_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the data included in the report */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* More detailed summary of the report */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations or insights generated from the report */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used in the report */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data used in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_details_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "setting_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the setting */,
  "setting_category" TEXT /* Category of the setting (e.g., system, user, data) */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modification timestamp of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
